equipment.name: Armor of Misery
equipment.desc: The model gains a 2+ armor save and the "Parry" ability. Unique.

equipment.name: Labyrinthine Cunning
equipment.desc: You gain an additional 0,25 Victory Points (VP) from secondary objectives. Unique.

equipment.name: Soul-Seeker
equipment.desc: One weapon of the model gains the "Soul burn(5+)" ability. Unique.
